output:
encoding="utf-8",
        )
        self.executor = GovernedExecutor(self.repo, self.policy)
        self.base_request = {
            "job_id": "phase-test-001",
            "objective": "Generate a small tested module.",
            "context_paths": ["docs/spec.md"],
            "target_paths": ["runtime/generated.py", "tests/test_generated.py"],
            "acceptance_checks": ["Python compiles", "isolated tests pass"],
            "timeout_seconds": 30,
        }

    def tearDown(self) -> None:
        self.server.shutdown()
        self.server.server_close()
        self.temp.cleanup()
        for name, value in self.saved_env.items():
            if value is not None:
                os.environ[name] = value
            else:
                os.environ.pop(name, None)

    def _write(self, rel: str, content: str) -> None:
        path = self.repo / rel
        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        path.write_text(content, encoding="utf-8")

    def _candidate_runs(self) -> list[Path]:
        root = self.repo / "memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase-test-001"
        if not root.is_dir():
            return []
        return sorted(
            p for p in root.iterdir()
            if p.is_dir() and p.name != "_background"
        )

    def test_primary_is_first_when_request_says_one_attempt(self) -> None:
        result = self.executor.author_candidate(
            {**self.base_request, "max_attempts": 1}
        )
        self.assertTrue(result["ok"], result)
        self.assertEqual(result["selected_model"], PRIMARY)
        self.assertEqual(StreamingOllamaHandler.requested_models, [PRIMARY])
        workspace = self.repo / result["workspace"]
        request = json.loads((workspace / "request.json").read_text())
        policy = request["authoring_policy"]
        self.assertEqual(policy["requested_max_attempts"], 1)
        self.assertEqual(policy["effective_max_attempts"], 2)
        self.assertEqual(policy["model_attempt_plan"], [PRIMARY, FALLBACK])
        stream_files = list((workspace / "authoring").glob("stream-*.jsonl"))
        self.assertEqual(len(stream_files), 1)
        self.assertGreater(stream_files[0].stat().st_size, 0)

    def test_fallback_follows_recorded_primary_failure(self) -> None:
        StreamingOllamaHandler.mode = "primary_invalid_fallback_success"
        result = self.executor.author_candidate(
            {**self.base_request, "max_attempts": 2}
        )
        self.assertTrue(result["ok"], result)
        self.assertEqual(result["selected_model"], FALLBACK)
        self.assertTrue(result["fallback_used"])
        self.assertEqual(
            StreamingOllamaHandler.requested_models,
            [PRIMARY, FALLBACK],
        )
        workspace = self.repo / result["workspace"]
        model_record = json.loads(
            (workspace / "authoring/model-record.json").read_text()
        )
        self.assertFalse(model_record["attempts"][0]["passed"])
        self.assertTrue(model_record["attempts"][1]["passed"])

    def test_authoring_failure_writes_terminal_state(self) -> None:
        def always_timeout(
            _self: GovernedExecutor,
            model: str,
            messages: list[dict[str, str]],
            timeout: int,
            *,
            progress_path: Path | None = None,
        ) -> dict:
            raise TimeoutError("fixture timeout")

        self.executor._ollama_chat = types.MethodType(always_timeout, self.executor)
        with self.assertRaises(GovernedError):
            self.executor.author_candidate(
                {**self.base_request, "max_attempts": 1}
            )
        runs = self._candidate_runs()
        self.assertEqual(len(runs), 1)
        state = json.loads((runs[0] / "run-state.json").read_text())
        attempts = json.loads((runs[0] / "authoring/attempts.json").read_text())
        self.assertEqual(state["status"], "failed")
        self.assertEqual(state["stage"], "authoring")
        self.assertEqual(state["attempts_completed"], 2)
        self.assertEqual(
            [item["model"] for item in attempts],
            [PRIMARY, FALLBACK],
        )
        status = self.executor.task_status(
            {"job_id": "phase-test-001", "run_id": runs[0].name}
        )
        self.assertEqual(status["selected_run"]["state"]["status"], "failed")

    def test_background_start_is_idempotent_and_pollable(self) -> None:
        StreamingOllamaHandler.mode = "slow_success"
        started_at = time.monotonic()
        first = self.executor.start_governed_phase(
            {**self.base_request, "max_attempts": 2}
        )
        elapsed = time.monotonic() - started_at
        self.assertTrue(first["ok"], first)
        self.assertLess(elapsed, 2.0)
        self.assertTrue(first["run_id"].startswith("bg-"))

        second = self.executor.start_governed_phase(
            {**self.base_request, "max_attempts": 2}
        )
        self.assertTrue(second["ok"], second)
        self.assertTrue(second["reused_active_run"])
        self.assertEqual(second["run_id"], first["run_id"])

        deadline = time.monotonic() + 20
        selected = None
        while time.monotonic() < deadline:
            status = self.executor.task_status(
                {
                    "job_id": "phase-test-001",
                    "run_id": first["run_id"],
                    "include_result": True,
                }
            )
            selected = status["selected_run"]
            state = selected["state"] or {}
            if state.get("status") in {"completed", "failed"}:
                break
            time.sleep(0.1)

        self.assertIsNotNone(selected)
        self.assertEqual(selected["state"]["status"], "completed", selected)
        self.assertTrue(selected["result_available"])
        self.assertTrue(selected["result"]["ok"])
        candidate_run_id = selected["state"]["candidate_run_id"]
        self.assertTrue(candidate_run_id.startswith("run-"))
        job = json.loads(
            (
                self.repo
                / "memory/phase-controller/jobs/phase-test-001/status.json"
            ).read_text()
        )
        self.assertEqual(job["status"], "awaiting_approval")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    unittest.main(verbosity=2)
